title: Richly Baked Dutch Ham Bake
description: A festive and umami-rich Dutch dish featuring ham, wrapped in ti leaves and baked to perfection, perfect for special occasions. This high-protein-friendly bake is sure to impress.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Wrap the Dutch ham in the ti leaves, making sure to seal the edges.
In a large skillet, sauté the chopped onions and minced garlic until softened.
Add the sliced mushrooms to the skillet and cook until they release their moisture and start to brown.
Add the chicken broth to the skillet and stir to combine.
Place the wrapped ham in a baking dish and pour the skillet mixture over it.
Drizzle the olive oil over the ham and sprinkle with shredded Gruyere cheese.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Bake for 30 minutes or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Let it rest for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
